specific_question: As of Q4 2024, what patient information can Rachel's customer service team access in real-time when helping confused patients, and how often is it used?
answer: As of Q4 2024, CSRs can view patient account details, billing history, scheduled appointments, and visit summaries (once processed), which they accessed while answering patient questions 95% of the time during 2024, according to IT records.
dr_question: According to an article published on TechTarget.com in 2024, excellent patient communication is critical for a successful customer service department. How can MediConn Solutions improve patient communication in order to reduce service calls into Q12025?
